name: The Three-Eyed Catfish King
type: Legendary Acorn Creature — Mutant Fish Noble
text:
Other Mutants and Sludge creatures you control get +1/+1.
Feed (Whenever a player rolls one or more dice, flips one or more coins, or votes, put a sludge counter on this creature.)
{1}{R}: Move a sludge counter from another creature you control onto The Three-Eyed Catfish King. The court of the reservoir collects its tithe.
The Three-Eyed Catfish King gets +2/+2 for each three sludge counters on it.
flavorText: He holds court at the bottom of the deep end. The other fish bring offerings. The offerings are the kids who dove in.
